## quickCaptureDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the quick-capture command.

Drives the CLI subcommand `quick` and the MCP tool `quick_add`<!-- -->. The positional `input` carries the natural-language entry string; `note` appends extra note text.

**Signature:**

```typescript
quickCaptureDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    input: string;
    note?: string | undefined;
}, OFTask, z.ZodObject<{
    input: z.ZodString;
    note: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodString>;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    input: string;
    note?: string | undefined;
}, {
    input: string;
    note?: string | undefined;
}>>
```
